---
title: "Research Log"
description: "Dated notes documenting the research, hypotheses, experiments and decisions behind the Pacific Dataviz Challenge 2026."
listing:
  contents: "20*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields:
    - date
    - title
    - description
    - categories
  page-size: 20
page-layout: full
---

This log documents the project as it develops. Entries may include early questions, incomplete experiments, code, visualizations, failed hypotheses and changes in direction.
